titles.title: Providing that section 11 of House Resolution 1224 shall have no force or effect.
Providing that section 11 of House Resolution 1224 shall have no force or effect.

action.text: The House Committee on Rules reported an original measure, H. Rept. 119-647, by Mrs. Fischbach.
providing that section 11 of H.Res. 1224 shall have no force or effect.

calendar.text: Placed on the House Calendar, Calendar No. 74.

bill.summary: This resolution eliminates a requirement to include the text of H.R. 1346, the Nationwide Consumer and Fuel Retailer Choice Act of 2025, as passed by the House of Representatives, in H.R. 7567, the Farm, Food, and National Security Act of 2026 (commonly known as the farm bill). The requirement is contained in H.Res. 1224, which also provides for the consideration of both H.R. 7567 and H.R. 1346. (H.Res. 1224 was agreed to in the House on April 29, 2026.)
